input.command:
python3 - <<'EOF'
baseline_raw = """sf_atan 88
sf_ceil 144
sf_cos 280
sf_fabs 16
sf_floor 156
sf_frexp 164
sf_ldexp 334
sf_modf 236
sf_sin 288
sf_tan 374
sf_tanh 522
sf_acos 348
sf_asin 302
sf_cosh 266
sf_exp 200
sf_fmod 416
sf_log 222
sf_log10 240
sf_pow 842
sf_sinh 456
sf_sqrt 290
sf_fpclassify 122
s_sin 296
s_cos 298
s_tan 374
s_atan 144
s_asin 538
s_acos 684
s_fabs 16
s_ceil 202
s_floor 222
s_exp 284
s_sinh 368
s_cosh 306
s_tanh 362
s_log 342
s_log10 392
s_sqrt 854
s_fmod 728
s_pow 1028
s_frexp 122
s_ldexp 332
s_modf 276
s_fpclassify 120
s_expm1 1176
s_log1p 1098
s_rint 398
s_round 228
s_trunc 152
s_fmax 102
s_fmin 102
s_ilogb 64
s_nextafter 390
s_remquo 104"""

opt5_raw = """sf_atan 88
sf_ceil 132
sf_cos 212
sf_fabs 8
sf_floor 136
sf_frexp 144
sf_ldexp 322
sf_modf 228
sf_sin 224
sf_tan 324
sf_tanh 468
sf_acos 332
sf_asin 286
sf_cosh 246
sf_exp 184
sf_fmod 400
sf_log 214
sf_log10 212
sf_pow 788
sf_sinh 402
sf_sqrt 286
sf_fpclassify 106
s_sin 284
s_cos 286
s_tan 362
s_atan 136
s_asin 514
s_acos 652
s_fabs 16
s_ceil 198
s_floor 202
s_exp 268
s_sinh 356
s_cosh 294
s_tanh 354
s_log 334
s_log10 384
s_sqrt 824
s_fmod 700
s_pow 988
s_frexp 118
s_ldexp 320
s_modf 272
s_fpclassify 104
s_expm1 1152
s_log1p 1062
s_rint 398
s_round 228
s_trunc 152
s_fmax 102
s_fmin 102
s_ilogb 64
s_nextafter 354
s_remquo 104"""

baseline = {}
for line in baseline_raw.strip().splitlines():
    parts = line.split()
    baseline[parts[0]] = int(parts[1])

opt5 = {}
for line in opt5_raw.strip().splitlines():
    parts = line.split()
    opt5[parts[0]] = int(parts[1])

order = list(baseline.keys())

rows = []
for fn in order:
    b = baseline[fn]
    n = opt5[fn]
    d = n - b
    pct = d / b * 100
    rows.append((fn, b, n, d, pct))

total_b = sum(r[1] for r in rows)
total_n = sum(r[2] for r in rows)
total_d = total_n - total_b
total_pct = total_d / total_b * 100

lines = []
lines.append("=== .text size comparison (bytes) ===")
lines.append("")
lines.append("  {:<21}{:>8}{:>7}{:>8}    {}".format("Function", "Baseline", "New", "Delta", "Change"))
lines.append("  {:<21}{:>8}{:>7}{:>8}    {}".format("----------", "--------", "----", "------", "------"))
for fn, b, n, d, pct in rows:
    lines.append("  {:<21}{:>8}{:>7}{:>8}    {:>7.2f}%".format(fn, b, n, d, pct))
lines.append("  {:<21}{:>8}{:>7}{:>8}    {}".format("--------------------", "-----", "----", "------", "------"))
lines.append("  {:<21}{:>8}{:>7}{:>8}    {:>7.2f}%".format("TOTAL", total_b, total_n, total_d, total_pct))
lines.append("")
lines.append("=== Summary ===")
lines.append("")
lines.append("  Total reduction:  {:4d} bytes".format(-total_d))
lines.append("  Overall change:  {:.2f}%".format(total_pct))
lines.append("")

# Top absolute reductions
sorted_abs = sorted(rows, key=lambda r: r[3])
lines.append("  Largest absolute reductions:")
for fn, b, n, d, pct in sorted_abs[:9]:
    if d >= 0:
        break
    lines.append("    {:<16}{:>4} bytes  ({:>7.2f}%)".format(fn, d, pct))
lines.append("")

# Top relative reductions
sorted_rel = sorted(rows, key=lambda r: r[4])
lines.append("  Largest relative reductions:")
for fn, b, n, d, pct in sorted_rel[:10]:
    if pct >= 0:
        break
    lines.append("    {:<16}{:.2f}%  ({:>4} bytes)".format(fn, pct, d))
lines.append("")

print('\n'.join(lines))
EOF
input.description: Generate size-report5 content from baseline and opt5

content.text: `size-report5` written. Summary: -982 bytes (-5.33% total), with `sf_cos` the largest absolute reduction at -68 bytes (-24.29%).
